name: Oficina SOAT - Mercado Pago Lab
description: Dashboard New Relic para consumo do Mercado Pago pelo oficina-billing-service no ambiente lab.

pages.name: Mercado Pago
pages.description: Volume, desfechos, latencia, valores, indisponibilidade e correlacao da integracao financeira.

rawConfiguration.text:
## Oficina SOAT - Mercado Pago

Substitua `accountIds: [0]` pelo ID da conta ao importar. As metricas usam labels de baixa cardinalidade: `service`, `provider`, `method`, `outcome`, `providerStatus`, `reason` e `currency`. Identificadores como `pagamentoId`, `transacaoExternaId` e `correlationId` permanecem apenas em logs e traces.

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Metric SELECT latest(payment_provider_enabled) AS 'habilitada' WHERE service = 'oficina-billing-service' AND provider = 'mercado-pago' FACET environment

FROM Metric SELECT rate(sum(payment_provider_requests_count_total), 1 minute) AS 'chamadas/min' WHERE service = 'oficina-billing-service' AND provider = 'mercado-pago' FACET method, outcome TIMESERIES

FROM Metric SELECT percentage(sum(payment_provider_requests_count_total), WHERE outcome = 'confirmed') AS 'sucesso %', percentage(sum(payment_provider_requests_count_total), WHERE outcome = 'rejected') AS 'recusa %', percentage(sum(payment_provider_requests_count_total), WHERE outcome = 'pending') AS 'pendente %', percentage(sum(payment_provider_requests_count_total), WHERE outcome = 'failure') AS 'erro %' WHERE service = 'oficina-billing-service' AND provider = 'mercado-pago'
FROM Metric SELECT sum(payment_provider_requests_count_total) AS 'chamadas' WHERE service = 'oficina-billing-service' AND provider = 'mercado-pago' FACET providerStatus, outcome, method LIMIT 30
FROM Metric SELECT percentile(payment_provider_request_duration_seconds, 95, 99) WHERE service = 'oficina-billing-service' AND provider = 'mercado-pago' FACET method, outcome TIMESERIES
FROM Metric SELECT sum(payment_provider_amount_BRL) AS 'valor BRL' WHERE service = 'oficina-billing-service' AND provider = 'mercado-pago' FACET method, outcome, currency LIMIT 30
FROM Metric SELECT sum(payment_provider_unavailable_count_total) AS 'indisponibilidades' WHERE service = 'oficina-billing-service' AND provider = 'mercado-pago' FACET reason LIMIT 30
FROM Metric SELECT sum(payment_provider_failures_count_total) AS 'falhas' WHERE service = 'oficina-billing-service' AND provider = 'mercado-pago' FACET method, reason LIMIT 30

FROM Log SELECT latest(timestamp) AS 'quando', latest(message) AS 'mensagem', latest(http.status) AS 'status', latest(traceId) AS 'traceId' WHERE service.name = 'oficina-billing-service' AND service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND correlationId IS NOT NULL AND (http.path LIKE '%pagamentos%' OR domainEventType LIKE 'pagamento%') FACET correlationId LIMIT 50

FROM Span SELECT latest(trace.id) AS 'traceId', latest(name) AS 'span', max(duration.ms) AS 'duracao max ms' WHERE service.name = 'oficina-billing-service' AND service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND (name LIKE '%MercadoPago%' OR name LIKE '%mercadopago%' OR http.url LIKE '%mercadopago%') FACET trace.id LIMIT 50
